headline: General Dynamics (GD) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: General Dynamics (GD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +11.27% and +6.15%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
